headings.usage: Use for H1, H2, H3, and document titles. Apply tracking-tight for a premium, authoritative legal feel. DO NOT use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use for all dashboard data, standard UI, paragraphs, and labels. Clean and highly legible.

mono.usage: Use for citations, page numbers, risk scores, and clause extraction IDs.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Dense 'Control Room' grid for dashboard/data views. Optical alignment over strict geometric centering.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid #2C2628. Do not use heavy drop shadows; rely on crisp 1px borders and slight background color differences to define hierarchy.

components.buttons: Solid primary background for main CTA. Transparent with 1px border for secondary. Avoid overly rounded pills; stick to sharp or slightly rounded corners.
components.cards: Subtle 1px border. Background should be #141316. Add hover lift (-translate-y-1) and slight border tint for clickable cards (like document lists).
components.upload_zone: Dashed border using the border color. On hover or drag-over, border should tint to primary (#E11D48) with a soft inner glow.
components.chat_panel: Use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-surface/70) for the chat header. Citations should be styled as clickable inline mono tags.
components.tables: Dense rows. No vertical dividers. Left-aligned columns. Hover state highlights the row.
components.tabs: Minimalist underline style. Active tab gets a primary color bottom border, inactive tabs remain muted.

motion.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-[1px]) and border color shift.

hero_background.description: Dark red textured background for auth screens, empty states, or hero sections with low opacity overlay.

contract_abstract.description: Macro photography of contract text, use for document placeholder or empty states.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Write all React code in .js / .jsx files, NOT .tsx.
CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-pdf-button').
Implement the UI using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Ensure dark mode is standard. Apply the color palette explicitly in Tailwind config.
Strip generic Shadcn styles to match the premium, sharp-cornered, authoritative aesthetic.
Implement split-pane layouts for the document viewer (PDF on left, Tabs/Tools on right).
